name: NextDNS

pricing.details: Free tier: 300,000 queries/month. Pro plan $19.90/year for unlimited queries.

description: Configurable encrypted DNS resolver with customizable blocklists, analytics dashboard, and per-device profiles. Logs queries by default with a configurable retention window.
rationale: NextDNS provides granular DNS-level filtering with a detailed analytics dashboard. It supports DNS-over-HTTPS, DNS-over-TLS, and DNS-over-QUIC. Query logging is enabled by default and retained for a configurable period — this is a significant privacy consideration. The service is not open source. For users who want DNS-level content filtering with visibility into DNS queries, NextDNS is the most configurable commercial option. Users with strict privacy requirements should use Quad9 or a self-hosted resolver instead.
